data.label: react-native-host
data.description: @rnx-kit/react-native-host 简化了 React Native 初始化。该包旨在提供一种向后（以及向前）兼容的 React Native 初始化方式，无论你使用的是新架构还是已完全无桥化。@rnx-kit/react-native-host 还将提供一种简单方式来启用拆分包和服务交付。

data.label: react-native-host
data.description: @rnx-kit/react-native-host simplifies React Native initialization. The aim of this package is to provide a backwards (and forwards) compatible way of initializing React Native, regardless of whether you're on New Architecture or have gone fully bridgeless.@rnx-kit/react-native-host will also a provide a simple way to enable split bundles and service delivery.
